_comment: Executive Project Reporting Dashboard - Data Template. Copy this file to src/ReportingDashboard/wwwroot/data/data.json and fill in your project data. All fields marked (optional) can be omitted or set to null.

project._comment_project: Top-level project information displayed in the dashboard header.
project.name: Your Project Name
project._comment_status: Free-text status label displayed in the header badge (e.g., 'On Track', 'At Risk', 'Behind Schedule').
project._comment_lastUpdated: Date string shown in the header. Use any readable format (e.g., '2026-01-15', 'January 2026').
project._comment_overallHealth: Controls the color of the status badge. Valid values: 'on-track' (green), 'at-risk' (orange), 'behind' (red).
project.summary: A brief paragraph describing the project's purpose, current phase, and key highlights for executive stakeholders.

milestones._comment_milestones: Array of project milestones displayed on the horizontal timeline. Order them chronologically.
milestones.title: Milestone Name
milestones._comment_date: Target or completion date for the milestone.
milestones._comment_status: Controls milestone color on timeline. Valid values: 'completed' (green), 'in-progress' (blue), 'upcoming' (gray), 'at-risk' (orange).
milestones.description: Brief description of what this milestone represents.

shipped._comment_shipped: Array of work items completed this reporting period. Displayed with green styling and 100% progress.
shipped.title: Completed Item Title
shipped.description: What was delivered and its business impact.
shipped._comment_category: (Optional) Short category label (e.g., 'Security', 'Infrastructure', 'API'). Displayed as a tag.

inProgress._comment_inProgress: Array of active work items. Displayed with blue styling and a proportional progress bar.
inProgress.title: Active Work Item Title
inProgress.description: Current status and what remains to be done.
inProgress._comment_percentComplete: Integer 0-100. Drives the visual progress bar width.

carriedOver._comment_carriedOver: Array of items deferred from previous period. Displayed with orange styling.
carriedOver.title: Deferred Item Title
carriedOver.description: Explain why this item was carried over and the plan for completion.

currentMonth._comment_currentMonth: Summary metrics displayed in the metrics strip at the top of the dashboard.
currentMonth._comment_totalItems: Total number of work items tracked this period.
currentMonth._comment_completedItems: Number of items completed/shipped this period.
currentMonth._comment_carriedItems: Number of items carried over from the previous period.
